name: safe-docx
description: AI-native Word document editing with stable paragraph anchors and deterministic DOCX operations.
long_description:
Safe Docx lets Claude work directly with .docx files on your local filesystem. It provides stable paragraph IDs (jr_para_*) for precise editing while preserving formatting and structure.

Core capabilities include reading/searching content, formatting-preserving edits and inserts, deterministic layout controls, tracked-changes output, comments, footnote tools, document comparison, and revision extraction.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read document content with stable paragraph IDs.

tools.name: grep
tools.description: Search for text patterns in the document.

tools.name: init_plan
tools.description: Initialize revision-bound metadata for coordinated planning.

tools.name: merge_plans
tools.description: Merge multiple sub-agent plans and detect conflicts.

tools.name: apply_plan
tools.description: Validate and apply a batch of edit steps in one transaction.

tools.name: replace_text
tools.description: Replace text in a paragraph while preserving formatting.

tools.name: insert_paragraph
tools.description: Insert a new paragraph before or after an anchor paragraph.

tools.name: download
tools.description: Save clean/tracked output document variants to disk.

tools.name: format_layout
tools.description: Apply deterministic paragraph/table layout formatting controls.

tools.name: accept_changes
tools.description: Accept tracked changes in the document body.

tools.name: has_tracked_changes
tools.description: Check whether the current document body contains tracked-change markers.

tools.name: get_session_status
tools.description: Get editing session metadata and status.

tools.name: clear_session
tools.description: Clear one session or all sessions.

tools.name: duplicate_document
tools.description: Duplicate a document and open a fresh session.

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment or threaded reply.

tools.name: get_comments
tools.description: Get all comments with IDs, anchors, authors, dates, and threaded replies.

tools.name: delete_comment
tools.description: Delete a comment and all threaded replies.

tools.name: compare_documents
tools.description: Compare two documents and write a tracked-changes output document.

tools.name: get_footnotes
tools.description: Get all footnotes with IDs, display numbers, text, and anchors.

tools.name: add_footnote
tools.description: Add a footnote anchored to a paragraph.

tools.name: update_footnote
tools.description: Update the text content of an existing footnote.

tools.name: delete_footnote
tools.description: Delete a footnote and its reference from the document.

tools.name: extract_revisions
tools.description: Extract tracked-change revisions as structured JSON.
